note: Authoritative technique-to-tactic map. A technique is credited to EVERY tactic the ICS matrix lists it under; a sub-technique inherits its parent's tactics (look up Txxxx for Txxxx.nnn). Ten techniques in v19.1 appear under more than one tactic (T1693 under three), which is why the techniques_available column of attack_ics_v19_1_catalog.csv totals 90 tactic-technique pairs across 79 distinct techniques. Coverage is reported at parent-technique grain, matching that catalog.
